businessBackground: Norwood Financial Corp is the holding company for Wayne Bank, a community bank serving northeastern Pennsylvania. The bank provides traditional commercial banking services including commercial and residential lending, deposit gathering, and wealth management. Revenue model: ~89% net interest income ($78.3M NII), ~11% non-interest income ($9.6M).
recentNotes: 2026-04-07: Transcript Review: Q4 2025 / FY2025 Earnings Call (Jan 22, 2026)
variantViews: The market has partially recognized the FY2025 turnaround but underestimates the forward earnings trajectory. The FY2024 "loss year" was a deliberate balance sheet reset — management proactively repositioned the securities portfolio ($20M loss), r...
